title: Annual Report 2023 - TechCorp Inc.
text: ITEM 1A. RISK FACTORS. Our business is subject to numerous risks. If we fail to retain our key executives, our business could suffer. ITEM 3. LEGAL PROCEEDINGS. The Company is currently subject to a class-action lawsuit regarding patent infringement filed in the Northern District of California.

title: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
text: 1. Confidential Information. 'Confidential Information' means all non-public, proprietary information disclosed by either party. 2. Term. This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of three (3) years from the Effective Date. 3. Governing Law. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.

title: Executive Employment Agreement
text: 1. Position and Duties. Employee shall serve as the Chief Financial Officer. 2. Compensation. The base salary shall be $250,000 per annum. 3. Termination for Cause. The Company may terminate Employee's employment immediately for 'Cause', which includes gross negligence or willful misconduct.

title: Asset Purchase Agreement
text: ARTICLE II. PURCHASE AND SALE. Seller agrees to sell, and Buyer agrees to purchase, all of the Acquired Assets free and clear of all Encumbrances. ARTICLE VIII. INDEMNIFICATION. Seller shall indemnify Buyer against any Losses arising out of any breach of representations or warranties made by Seller.

title: Software as a Service (SaaS) Terms of Service
text: 1. License Grant. Provider grants Customer a non-exclusive, non-transferable right to access the SaaS Product. 4. Limitation of Liability. In no event shall Provider's aggregate liability exceed the total amounts paid by Customer in the 12 months preceding the claim.
